product.name: Arox T2 Static Pro
product.familyDescriptorPl: Tkaniny robocze funkcyjne — antystatyczne i hydrofobowe
product.categorySourceGroup: Polyester Woven Fabrics for Raincoats, Jackets and Coveralls
product.specLine: 160 g/m², 99% Polyester 1% Carbon, Antistatic, 2/1 S Twill Fabric
descriptions: 99% polyester 1% carbon, antistatic ESD workwear twill fabric.
Arox T2 Static pro fabrics are mostly used for clean room's cloths.
Suitable for antistatic ESD application like electronic industry, certified for EN ISO 1149-5.
160 g/m², 99% Polyester 1% Carbon, Antistatic, 2/1 S Twill Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp > 900N ; Weft > 700N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp > 25N ; Weft > 20N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Product is antistatic (EN 1149-5) and used for ESD/electronic industry, but no explicit electrical utility, high-voltage or EMI shielding use is stated, only electronic manufacturing/cleanroom context.
Description mentions cleanroom clothing, which could relate to pharma/medical cleanrooms, but no explicit healthcare or hospital use is stated.

stage1.noMatchReason: The product is described explicitly as an antistatic ESD twill fabric for cleanroom clothing and the electronic industry, certified to EN ISO 1149-5 and EN 13034 for chemical protection. No explicit sector such as energy, medical, firefighting, military, welding, motorcycle, hivis, architecture-building or transport use is stated in the supplied data.

evidence: 99% polyester 1% carbon, antistatic ESD workwear twill fabric.
Suitable for antistatic ESD application like electronic industry, certified for EN ISO 1149-5.
categorySourceGroup: Polyester Woven Fabrics for Raincoats, Jackets and Coveralls
primary.rationale: The product is an antistatic ESD twill fabric intended for cleanroom/electronic industry workwear and coveralls, matching general industrial protective apparel without a narrower named sector (energy, medical) being explicitly stated as the dominant end use.

secondary.rationale: No independently stated secondary sector such as medical or energy is explicit; cleanroom use is generic and electronic industry ESD context is already covered by antistatic property, not a distinct named application per rules 8 and exclusions.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: Antistatic ESD property alone does not establish energy-sector use per rule 8; no electrical utility or high-voltage context stated.
Cleanroom mention is generic, not explicitly healthcare/hospital use.
